Elden Ring Randomizer
Seed: 0000000001

--- Key item placements ---

Rold Medallion: Dropped by Morgott, the Omen King (Leyndell, Royal Capital)
Cursemark of Death: In a chest behind the fog gate (Deeproot Depths)

--- All item placements ---

Dropped by Morgott, the Omen King (Leyndell, Royal Capital): Rold Medallion (was Morgott's Great Rune) [key]
In a chest behind the fog gate (Deeproot Depths): Cursemark of Death (was Fingerslayer Blade) [key]
This line has no colon separator and no arrow so it should be unmatched
Sold by Twin Maiden Husks after obtaining Gostoc's Bell Bearing (Roundtable Hold): Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [1] (was Stonesword Key)
Starting loadout (Hero class): Battle Axe (was Battle Axe)
On a corpse guarded by a Grafted Scion (Fringefolk Hero's Grave): Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone (was Golden Seed)
